case_title: MIGUEL D DANAO VS. NATHAN MCGUIRE, AN INDIVIDUAL, DBA MYRMIDON

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF DANAO, MIGUEL D AS TO DEFENDANT NATHAN MCGUIRE, AN INDIVIDUAL, DBA MYRMIDON PROTECTIVE SERVICES JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
